since_last: 28% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.05%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.39% · BTC -2.05% · Gold -2.05% · Nasdaq100 -2.18%. 28% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.05%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.05%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.92%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +5.56%, AVAV +3.76%, SKHY +3.25%, MU +3.04%, FIX +2.48%. Laggards: TSLA -13.92%, GOOGL -7.62%, CRNC -6.69%, UPST -5.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.29% at $111.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
